stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP696 file 4.12.
If the ZFM is 48 000 kg and the ZFM CG is at 25% MAC, is the ZFM CG ‘index’ within limits?

options.a: No, it is outside of the forward limit.
options.b: Nο, it is outside of the aft limit.
options.c: Yes it is in limits with an aft index.
options.d: Yes it is in limits with a forward index.
